notes: The game tries to install Microsoft VC Redist Package every time it starts but it runs fine anyway. I derped around for a few minutes and didn't see any issues. Had to turn off FXAA and set draw distance to "low spec" to maintain semi-consistent 60fps but I remember that performance was bad on Windows as well. The studio works fine too.
title: FRACT OSC
